# Functional Neural Network

**Summary**: An AI model similar to ANN but utilizing a more generalized functional model with multiple arguments.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-almomen|Almomen, 2024]] implemented FNN to capture complex input and output relationships for ROP prediction.
